DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY SEPTEMBER 5, 2025. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT MOHAMMED MANEA's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The moving party failed to provide a meet and confer declaration in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered immediately to comply with the code. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by September 5, 2025.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
